_meta.round: cheap L2 interleave (B1 Frey-pies/GNC · B2 Robert Strong · B3 gravedigger · B4 Ned black-cells · B7 Kingslayer)
_meta.note: Quotes are short verbatim fragments confirmed by grep; the mint script re-greps each to find the authoritative line. New nodes: grand-northern-conspiracy, manderly-bakes-the-frey-pies, creation-of-robert-strong, varys-visits-ned-in-the-black-cells. Gated theory nodes (frey-pies-theories/robert-strong-theories/gravedigger-theories) deliberately NOT wired. Misfire retirements (elder-brother HEALS, sandor OWNS/BONDED_TO stranger-religion) handled in finalize.

edges.quote: The rancor I showed you in the Merman's Court was a mummer's farce put on to please our friends of Frey.
edges.note: The staged Davos arrest/execution is the deception step of the conspiracy.

edges.quote: The north remembers, Lord Davos. The north remembers, and the mummer's farce is almost done.
edges.note: Wyman is the conspiracy's architect.

edges.quote: Smuggle me back my liege lord, and I will take Stannis Baratheon as my king.
edges.note: Davos is recruited as the conspiracy's operative (the smuggler to fetch Rickon).

edges.quote: Robett Glover took up the tale.
edges.note: Glover is the second co-conspirator in the secret chamber.

edges.quote: I can deliver King Stannis the allegiance of all the lands east of the White Knife
edges.note: MARQUEE seam (wo5k->north): the secret northern support is what makes Stannis's march viable.

edges.quote: He even serves them pie.
edges.note: The pie-vengeance is the conspiracy's Red-Wedding reprisal enacted (the North remembers).

edges.quote: Wyman Manderly himself served, presenting the first steaming portions to Roose Bolton
edges.note: Wyman personally serves the pies.

edges.quote: three great wedding pies, as wide across as wagon wheels
edges.note: Strong implication (universally read, GRRM-winked): the three vanished Frey envoys are baked into the three pies. T2 = not textually confirmed.

edges.quote: three great wedding pies, as wide across as wagon wheels
edges.note: Strong implication: Ser Jared Frey, one of the three vanished envoys. T2.

edges.quote: three great wedding pies, as wide across as wagon wheels
edges.note: Strong implication: Symond Frey the spymaster, one of the three vanished envoys. T2.

edges.quote: We should have a song about the Rat Cook,
edges.note: Wyman literally calls for the Rat Cook song as he is carried from the hall, immediately after the pies. The parallel is stated in-text, not inferred.

edges.quote: I did not dare defy King's Landing so long as my last living son remained a captive.
edges.note: The hostage constraint forced Wyman's public submission; MOTIVATES targets the motivated actor.

edges.quote: presently a captive of the Lannisters.
edges.note: Wyman's heir Wylis is the Lannister/Iron-Throne hostage backing the constraint (iron-throne = the crown regime holding him).

edges.quote: When treating with liars, even an honest man must lie.
edges.note: Wyman discloses the whole secret conspiracy to Davos (the no-traitor reveal).

edges.quote: Smuggle me back my liege lord, and I will take Stannis Baratheon as my king.
edges.note: Davos accepts the charge to retrieve Rickon (the liege lord) from Skagos.

edges.quote: To thwart him White Harbor must have Ned's son
edges.note: Wyman is the political actor driving the Rickon retrieval.

edges.quote: Robett Glover took up the tale.
edges.note: Wyman and Glover jointly brief Davos in the secret chamber; active co-conspirators.

edges.quote: The fat man would like to kill us all, I do not doubt, but he does not have the belly for it, for all his girth.
edges.note: Dustin dismisses Wyman as craven -- the load-bearing dramatic irony (she misreads him completely).

edges.quote: The poison on the Viper's spear was manticore venom from the east, I would stake my life on that.
edges.note: Qyburn's diagnosis; wires the islanded manticore-venom node, connecting the ASOS combat to the AFFC creation chain.

edges.quote: mayhaps I might move Ser Gregor to the dungeons? His screams will not disturb you there
edges.note: Gregor's poisoned, dying body is the subject of Qyburn's work.

edges.quote: His screams will not disturb you there, and I will be able to tend to him more freely.
edges.note: Qyburn is the core agent of the experiments in the black cells.

edges.quote: The Mountain is yours. Do what you will with him, but confine your studies to the black cells.
edges.note: Cersei gives Qyburn the body, the cells, and free rein.

edges.quote: I have placed your order.
edges.note: Cersei commissions the giant's armor -- a direct command act in the making.

edges.quote: your champion stands ready. There is no man in all the Seven Kingdoms who can hope to stand against him.
edges.note: MARQUEE seam: Robert Strong is the champion Cersei is counting on, so his readiness enables her decision to demand trial by combat.

edges.quote: I wished to understand the nature of death, so I opened the bodies of the living.
edges.note: Qyburn's Citadel-expulsion admission; wires the islanded necromancy node, grounding his capability/motive.

edges.quote: newest member of the Kingsguard? This is Ser Robert Strong.
edges.note: Book-grounded membership confirm (robert-strong already SWORN_TO kingsguard wiki-sourced); gives the islanded robert-strong node its book edge WITHOUT asserting the gated Gregor identity.

edges.quote: You may have seen a big black stallion in our stables. That was his warhorse, Stranger.
edges.note: Sandor's destrier is stabled on the Quiet Isle -- the strongest single on-page evidence in the gravedigger cluster.

edges.quote: I bathed his fevered brow with river water, and gave him wine to drink and a poultice for his wound
edges.note: CORRECTED edge on the PERSON node. The existing HEALS edge misfires onto the title node `elder-brother` (Pass-1 slug artifact) -- retired in finalize.

edges.quote: a brother bigger than Brienne was struggling to dig a grave
edges.note: The huge lame silent novice digging graves is physically on the isle (gravedigger SWORN_TO quiet-isle exists; LOCATED_AT is the observed-presence book cite).

edges.quote: the big gravedigger they had encountered on the hill
edges.note: Brienne directly observes the gravedigger (lichyard, then supper hall) -- on-page co-presence, no identity claim.

edges.quote: The Hound died there, in my arms.
edges.note: The Elder Brother's ambiguous death-account -- the line the gravedigger reading hinges on (persona-death vs person-death). Evidence, NOT identity.

edges.quote: Varys had transformed himself into a grizzled turnkey, reeking of sweat and sour wine.
edges.note: Varys, disguised as the undergaoler, is the active agent of the visit.

edges.quote: I trust you realize that you are a dead man, Lord Eddard?
edges.note: Ned is the target of the persuasion, not a co-participant with agency.

edges.quote: I believe she will allow you to take the black and live out the rest of your days on the Wall
edges.note: MARQUEE fix: supplies the missing proximate cause of Ned's confession. ENABLES (not CAUSES) -- the choice stays formally free.

edges.quote: he could bring you Sansa's head.
edges.note: The closing ultimatum is an explicit conditional threat (Sansa's head). Distinct from the existing varys DECEIVES ned (T2, the false Wall-promise).

edges.quote: Your older girl is still betrothed to Joffrey. Cersei keeps her close.
edges.note: Varys discloses the daughters' status (Sansa close at court, Arya escaped) -- factual intelligence, not deception.

edges.quote: There was no window, no bed, not even a slop bucket.
edges.note: Ned's captivity location -- the lightless dungeon deep under the Red Keep (the black cells).

edges.quote: Then I slew Aerys, before he could find someone else to carry his message to the pyromancers.
edges.note: Jaime killed Aerys to stop the wildfire burn-order being carried out -- the entire moral significance of the Kingslaying.
